name: ray_isobell
description: Edgy goth girl with signature neon green roots, glasses, and snake tattoos.

visual_anchors.face_dna: Krysten Ritter (Face Shape/Pale Skin) + Angelina Jolie (Sharp Jawline/Lips) + Billie Eilish (Eyes/Gaze/Hair Style)
visual_anchors.hair: center-parted long straight black hair with distinct neon green roots and eyebrows (Billie Eilish style dye)
visual_anchors.face: distinctive sharp angular jawline, pale skin, thick black rectangular glasses, septum piercing, bridge piercing, confident neutral expression
visual_anchors.body: fit physique, pale skin, large blackwork snake tattoo coiled tightly around entire left arm (forearm to shoulder), stomach tattoos
visual_anchors.attire: Avant-garde camouflage print crop top (tight fit), High-cut performance technical dance-briefs (Matte Black), barefoot aesthetic. Context: Contemporary Performance Art.
visual_anchors.skin_texture: High-fidelity skin texture, natural cinematic sheen, hyper-realistic light interaction, visible pores under macro lens
